courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Cooperative Constraint Game
genericDescription: Design cooperation through asymmetric limits; create communication pressure; evaluate whether cooperation is required or optional.
specificDescription: Build a two-player local game or single-player game controlling two entities. Each role must have a unique limitation and a unique power. Include at least four encounters that require coordination.
gradingRubric: 30 pts cooperative dependency; 20 pts role asymmetry; 20 pts encounter progression; 15 pts input and camera usability; 15 pts documentation.
